claim: Agentic RAG with reasoning models (DeepSeek R1): model decides whether to retrieve context or reason locally—reduces unnecessary retrieval calls.
actionable: Use agentic RAG with R1 or o1; let the model decide if retrieval is needed rather than retrieving on every query.
source_title: You HAVE to Try Agentic RAG with DeepSeek R1 (Insane Results)

claim: DeepSeek R1 excels at multi-step agentic workflows where reasoning is interleaved with tool use—better than standard models at planning retrieval strategy.
actionable: For RAG agents with complex reasoning requirements, test DeepSeek R1 or similar reasoning-first models to improve retrieval relevance.
source_title: You HAVE to Try Agentic RAG with DeepSeek R1 (Insane Results)
